title: Upington, Northern Cape — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Upington, Northern Cape: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Upington is a city in Northern Cape with a population of 75,000. A desert oasis on the Orange River, known for its vineyards, date farms, and Kalahari landscapes.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
